intake.risk_posture: Moderate frontend normalization; preserve database browse behavior while allowing visual cleanup aligned with Timeline/D-zone.
intake.harness_policy: Product docs and goal packet updates allowed; no dependency, AGENTS.md, lint, or plugin changes without a routed maintenance task.
allowed_areas: src/ui/** when directly consumed by database browse
intake.stop_condition: Stop when one verified tranche lands, a product/design decision is needed, verification fails twice, or expansion crosses protected scope.

focus_areas.name: Tailwind/CSS normalization
focus_areas.evidence: User called out index CSS monolith and page-specific Timeline/D-zone CSS.
focus_areas.next: W1 moved database browse/card CSS into src/features/database/database.css.

focus_areas.name: React component simplification
focus_areas.evidence: User named $refactor-react for database landing/browse pages.
focus_areas.next: W3 moved database-only card/grid primitives into the database feature and replaced class-name sniffing with an explicit grid layout prop.

focus_areas.name: UI/a11y polish
focus_areas.evidence: User named $refactor-ui-a11y for controls, cards, layout, and browse behavior.
focus_areas.next: W2 implemented filter group/current-state semantics and W4 associated card buttons with visible titles.

focus_areas.name: Impeccable design alignment
focus_areas.evidence: PRODUCT/DESIGN set Timeline/D-zone as current canon and restrict glass/Droid Serif.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by preserving desktop text-on-art glass only for poster cards, keeping mobile dossier solid, localizing database CSS like Timeline/D-zone, and avoiding new Droid Serif spread.

focus_areas.name: Detail modal
focus_areas.evidence: User explicitly excluded the DB details modal.
focus_areas.reason: The user said the actual DB details modal is out of scope for this pass.
focus_areas.next: Do not touch in this pass.

candidates.title: Move database poster-card CSS out of src/index.css into database-owned or shared artwork-overlay CSS
concept_blast_radius: focused database tests and visual checks
candidates.evidence: Recent glass overlay landed in global CSS; Timeline and D-zone already use page-specific CSS files.
candidates.next: Implemented by W1 as database-owned CSS extraction.

candidates.title: Normalize database browse controls/card layout class strings
candidates.evidence: Prompt asks for less CSS bloat and frontend normalization.
candidates.next: Implemented for the card/grid layer by W3; remaining control class normalization is not selected in this tranche.

candidates.title: Audit card/button accessibility and focus after poster overlay changes
candidates.evidence: UI/a11y focus area named; glass overlays can affect readable contrast and focus.

candidates.title: Move database-only card primitives out of shared ui/cards and remove magic class-name layout detection
candidates.evidence: All consumers of the moved primitives were database browse files. The previous CatalogGrid API parsed class names for hybrid mode.

maintenance.title: Database CSS ownership rule
maintenance.reason: The implemented root fix localizes database browse CSS and no post-fix repeated drift was found; a lint or learning rule is not warranted for this tranche.
maintenance.next: Reopen only if page-specific CSS drifts into src/index.css again.

tasks.title: Map database browse frontend normalization tranche
allowed_files: src/ui/** when directly consumed by database browse
tasks.expected_output: Ranked candidates with evidence, concept blast radius, validation ideas, and maintenance candidates.

receipt.summary: Two read-only scouts mapped database browse/card CSS ownership and browse React/UI-a11y issues.
evidence: CSS scout found database-card-roster, database-card-grid, database-grid-card__surface/body/art, hybrid dossier/poster, and reduced-motion rules in src/index.css while Timeline/D-zone import page-owned CSS.
React/UI-a11y scout found queued follow-ups for card overlay button semantics, filter row group labels, database entity current state, sort/group grouping, and chip overflow.

tasks.title: Select first CSS ownership root-fix slice
tasks.expected_output: Approve one database-owned CSS extraction slice that preserves browse visuals.

receipt.summary: Selected root-fix slice C1: move database browse/card CSS out of src/index.css into database-owned CSS. This removes feature-specific rules from the global monolith instead of patching them in place.
evidence: Timeline imports src/pages/timeline/timeline.css from TimelinePage.
D-zone imports src/pages/d-zone/d-zone.css from DZone pages.
Database card browse selectors are database-specific and can be moved without touching detail modal CSS.

tasks.title: Move database browse/card CSS into database-owned stylesheet
tasks.expected_output: Database browse/card CSS extracted from src/index.css, imported by the database page, with visual behavior preserved.

receipt.summary: Moved database browse/grid-card CSS from src/index.css into src/features/database/database.css and imported it from DatabasePage.
evidence: Files changed: src/features/database/DatabasePage.tsx, src/features/database/database.css, src/index.css.
Kept database rich text/detail/popover global CSS in src/index.css.
Subagent ran npx prettier --check --ignore-unknown src/features/database/DatabasePage.tsx src/features/database/database.css src/index.css and git diff --check successfully.
validation: Focused full validation still pending after W2.

tasks.title: Select small browse UI/a11y semantics slice
protected_files: card markup semantics beyond labels/focus naming
tasks.expected_output: Add semantic grouping/current-state labels without visual or behavior changes.

receipt.summary: Selected a low-risk UI/a11y slice from C3 that does not touch the detail modal or card visual structure.
evidence: Scout found filter row labels are visual only.
Scout recommended confirming or adding current-page state to database entity links.
Scout noted compact Group by realm can have a clearer accessible name.

tasks.title: Add browse filter group and current-state semantics
tasks.expected_output: Filter rows expose group labels, active database entity links expose current page state, and Group by realm has a clear toggle name.

receipt.summary: Added browse semantics without changing layout: filter rows now expose grouped labels, database entity links expose explicit current-page state, and Group by realm has a clearer accessible toggle name.
evidence: Files changed: src/ui/filters/FilterRow.tsx, src/ui/filters/FilterChipButton.tsx, src/features/database/DatabaseEntityTabs.tsx, src/features/database/internal/EntityViewControls.tsx.
Browser checks confirmed current tab state is Wheels on /database/wheels and Awakeners on /database, with grouped filter labels present.

tasks.title: Localize database card primitives and simplify grid layout API
tasks.expected_output: Database-only card/grid primitives live in the database feature, and grid callers select card mode through an explicit prop instead of a class-name constant.

receipt.summary: Moved database browse card primitives from src/ui/cards into src/features/database/internal and replaced HYBRID_DATABASE_GRID_CLASS_NAME/className parsing with DatabaseCatalogGrid layout='hybrid'.
evidence: src/ui/cards now contains only CompactArtTile files after the database-specific move.
DatabaseGrid and WheelGrid pass layout='hybrid'; simple artifact grids use the portrait default.
Focused card/grid tests and browser checks passed.
validation: Browser checks: desktop /database/wheels poster mode with 5 / 8 art and blur(2px), /database current tab/group labels, mobile /database/wheels dossier mode with no glass and no horizontal overflow

tasks.title: Associate database card buttons with visible card titles
tasks.expected_output: The clickable card control uses the visible title as part of its accessible name without changing visual layout or card behavior.

receipt.summary: Associated the database card overlay button with the visible title by using aria-labelledby while keeping the existing aria-label attribute for compatibility.
evidence: DatabaseGridCardFrame now creates a stable visible title id and a hidden action phrase for the button name.
Awakener, wheel, posse, and covenant cards keep their existing aria-label attributes for current tests and ordering checks.
validation: Focused database route/card tests passed after the compatibility repair.
Browser check confirmed aria-label and aria-labelledby text both resolve to the visible card action.

tasks.title: Replace collection sort controls with database-owned browse controls
tasks.expected_output: Database browse sort/group controls stop routing through CollectionSortControls and own their compact chrome locally.

receipt.summary: Replaced database browse usage of CollectionSortControls with database-owned compact sort/group controls and database-owned select option styling.
evidence: EntityViewControls no longer imports CollectionSortControls or Button.
Database sort selects use database-sort-select classes defined in src/features/database/database.css.
Awakener and wheel browse still expose the same sort select labels and direction button labels.
validation: Browser checks confirmed Database view controls role=group, database-sort-select class usage, and no horizontal overflow.

final_audit.summary: Refactor Discipline audit and first implementation tranche are complete for database landing/browse pages. The tranche normalized database CSS ownership, removed fake shared card primitives, replaced class-name-sniffed grid layout with an explicit API, added browse UI/a11y semantics, associated card controls with visible titles, and replaced collection-owned sort chrome with database-owned controls. Detail modal files remained out of scope.
validation: npx prettier --check --ignore-unknown src/features/database/DatabasePage.tsx src/features/database/database.css src/features/database/DatabaseEntityTabs.tsx src/features/database/internal/EntityViewControls.tsx src/features/database/internal/DatabaseCatalogGrid.tsx src/features/database/internal/DatabaseGridCardFrame.tsx src/features/database/internal/DatabaseStatTriad.tsx src/features/database/internal/database-card-typography.ts src/features/database/internal/hybrid-database-card-mode.ts src/features/database/internal/AwakenerGridCard.tsx src/features/database/internal/WheelGridCard.tsx src/features/database/internal/SimpleArtifactGridCard.tsx src/features/database/internal/DatabaseGrid.tsx src/features/database/internal/WheelGrid.tsx src/features/database/internal/SimpleArtifactGrid.tsx src/ui/filters/FilterRow.tsx src/ui/filters/FilterChipButton.tsx src/index.css docs/refactor-goals/database-browse-normalization/goal.md docs/refactor-goals/database-browse-normalization/state.json docs/refactor-goals/database-browse-normalization/worklog.md -> passed

npx vitest run src/features/database/DatabaseRoutes.test.tsx src/features/database/internal/AwakenerGridCard.test.tsx src/features/database/internal/WheelGridCard.test.tsx src/features/database/internal/DatabaseGrid.test.tsx -> 4 files, 36 tests passed
Browser checks passed for desktop /database, desktop /database/wheels, and mobile /database/wheels after W5
